tweets.text:
The only thing Thomas Massie actually disagree with Trump or Republicans on, we're contentious inner party issues and debates such as us spending less, not approving more senseless waste or spending, not going to war or starting new wars, not favoring any more gun control, voting against censorship, voting against illegal spying and authoritarian government overreach...

Any disagreements Massey had, were predictable and reasonable, Even if I or others didn't agree. It's so ridiculous how you, so many Republicans and Trump attack this guy like he's the worst, Trump literally called him the worst which is utterly ridiculous. 

As someone who voted for Trump multiple times, this whole attitude and treatment towards Massey ruins his legacy for me. If no other issue, this was a big negative to his reputation, to a lot of us who only joined the Republican tent in terms of voting for it, because it was the side opened disagreement in dialogue. 

Not liars and people who force strict adherence and obedience, and are okay with betraying the people for foreign allegiance is, corporations and special interests. 

Trump only won a lot of us over because he had a better stands on immigration, the border, dealing with illegals, draining the swamp, reducing regulation, cutting spending, and being against senseless wars or occupations. 

There's a lot of us who supported Ron Paul, and still favor the libertarian and constitutionalist side of Republicans.

If you all want to act dishonestly and disenfranchised our part of politics, well then good luck in the future. 

I mean I don't mind you all trying to push a candidate against Massey and unseat him, but just how extreme you all have been and lied about him is completely unnecessary and totally   trust losing dishonesty.
